failedAssertions.reason: Numeric seeds (0, 1) crash — TanStack Router coerces purely numeric query params to numbers, but the Zod schema expects string. Error: 'Invalid input: expected string, received number'. Non-numeric edge-case seeds (a, 00000, space, verylong) work correctly. Fix: Use z.coerce.string() or add a preprocess step in the Zod schema to convert numbers to strings.

Navigating to /game (no seed param) redirects to a random seed URL but then crashes with React error: 'Rendered more hooks than during the previous render'. The redirect changes the route params, causing a hooks mismatch between the initial and redirected render. Fix: Use a server-side redirect or ensure the redirect doesn't trigger a re-render that changes hook count.
Empty seed (/game?seed=) triggers the same redirect-and-hooks-crash as VAL-BG-008. Same root cause.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Playwright click timeout workaround note: Playwright clicks timeout on board squares (especially during celebration overlay or with special characters in text). Workaround: use JS eval with element.click() or dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', {bubbles:true})) instead of agent-browser click commands.
